title: Bluesky Jetstream connector configuration
description: Consumes the public Bluesky Jetstream firehose (no API key) and imports each post as an FtM Article (metadata only) with provenance. A one-way PULL into the landing zone + ER queue.

wanted_collections.title: Wanted collections
wanted_collections.description: Jetstream lexicon collections to subscribe to (only post-create commits map to an Article).

window_seconds.title: Window (seconds)
window_seconds.description: Wall-clock length of one bounded consumption window before the run returns and re-runs.

max_events.title: Maximum events
max_events.description: Hard cap on the number of events consumed per window (bounds each run).

endpoint.title: Jetstream endpoint
endpoint.description: Optional override of the public Jetstream WebSocket host (defaults to the public firehose).
